name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.6.9 Git Flow merge/publish workflow restoration and selected-feature merge support
added: Merge & Publish workflow guidance for feature -> develop -> main promotion
Branch tracking overview using git branch -vv
Selected feature branch merge into develop, even while currently on develop
Quality-check gate button before promoting develop to main
Pull-request URL detection from GitHub push output
next_recommended: Add GitHub CLI support for optional gh repo create --private after explicit confirmation
Add merge conflict preflight summary before running merges
Add release tag prompt after develop -> main promotion
Add optional branch cleanup after merged feature branch is pushed and merged
highlights: Restores clearer merge support that had become hidden or too current-branch dependent
Supports the real workflow: push feature upstream, merge selected feature into develop, run checks, merge develop into main
Keeps every merge/push action previewable and confirmation-based
